subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thanks for reaching out — I’d be happy to set up a conversation about potential collaboration. I’m available during these windows:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

If any of those times work, please send over an invite. I’m not able to share internal contact details, but our public website has the general information available for external partners.

Best,
Agent
